title: Traviata '53
writer: Siro Angeli, Vittorio Cottafavi, Alexandre Dumas fils
actors: Barbara Laage, Armando Francioli, Eduardo De Filippo
plot: Updated version of the Camille melodrama: An engineer has a romance with the mistress of a rich banker but she sacrifices herself,returning to the rich man, for the best interests of the lover and his family.
